May 27, 2025-English Proficiency Exam

KHAS English Proficiency Exam will be held on May 27, 2025 at the School of Foreign Languages.

Students who are in their second year and not enrolled in the Preparatory Program in the Spring semester must register for the exam from the link below in order to take the exam between 12-16 May.

https://form.khas.edu.tr/khas-stys

Necessary notifications will be made via the announcements section on the website and via your e-mail with the khas extension.

Quick Search

Through this form, you can access news, announcements, faculties and departments, base scores, our academic staff and administrative personnel, and their internal phone numbers.
